Metadata.rootTitle: Murphy Cloud - WorkSync Docs Collaboration and More Online Tools
Metadata.rootDescription: Murphy Cloud brings together five SaaS products: WorkSync for project documentation and collaboration, Sign for event engagement, Xiaozu for AI-assisted Chinese chess, a mobile H5 store, and TimeSlot for course booking.
Metadata.ogTitle: Murphy Cloud - WorkSync Docs Collaboration and More Online Tools
Metadata.ogDescription: WorkSync collaboration, Sign event engagement, Xiaozu chess AI, mobile commerce, and TimeSlot course booking.
Metadata.twitterTitle: Murphy Cloud - WorkSync Docs Collaboration and More Online Tools
Metadata.twitterDescription: Online SaaS products for documentation, events, chess AI, mobile shopping, and course booking.
Metadata.worksyncDescription: Centralized docs, task management, PlantUML diagrams, and collaborative whiteboards in one workspace.

ContactDialog.title: Contact us
ContactDialog.description: Tell us what you need from Murphy Cloud. We will get back to you soon.
ContactDialog.tipBody: Business hours: Monday to Friday, 9:00-18:00. You can also email us or add WeChat outside business hours.

Footer.description: WorkSync is the flagship project documentation and collaboration platform. Murphy Cloud also provides Sign event engagement, Xiaozu chess AI, mobile commerce, and TimeSlot course booking services.

Login.iframeTitle: WorkSync project documentation and collaboration platform

hero.title: Murphy Cloud
hero.subtitle: Five SaaS products, one cloud solution suite
hero.description: Docs collaboration · event engagement · chess AI · H5 commerce · course booking - built for teams, events, learning, shopping, and training

preview.xiaozu: AI engine · live analysis · online matches

worksync.subtitle: Project documentation and collaboration platform
worksync.description: WorkSync brings document management, task boards, PlantUML diagrams, collaborative whiteboards, and an AI diagram assistant into one workspace for the full project lifecycle.

xiaozu.title: Xiaozu
xiaozu.subtitle: Chinese chess AI assistant
xiaozu.tagline: A small pawn can change the game
xiaozu.description: Powered by the Pikafish chess engine, Xiaozu gives Chinese chess players professional analysis, move suggestions, reviews, and online play support.

sign.subtitle: Event engagement platform
sign.tagline: Sign in. Stand out. Scan, gather, and engage.
sign.description: Sign covers check-in, voting, lottery, and forms for enterprise events. Participants scan with their phones, organizers get live big-screen updates, and an event can be created in minutes.

shopping.title: Mobile Store
shopping.subtitle: H5 mobile commerce platform
shopping.description: A Next.js 16 mobile commerce app with product browsing, cart management, order tracking, and search. Mobile-first and ready for shopping anywhere.

timeslot.subtitle: Course booking system
timeslot.description: TimeSlot supports online booking for AP courses, programming, contest training, and more. Parents can scan to book on mobile while teachers manage schedules and students.

why.title: Why Murphy Cloud
why.description: A unified platform, modern engineering, and flexible deployment for teams of different sizes

worksync.title: Centralized docs
worksync.desc: Markdown and rich text modes, structured folders, and full-text search keep knowledge out of chats and inboxes.

worksync.title: Task boards
worksync.desc: Kanban and list views organize work by priority and owner so milestones stay visible.

worksync.title: PlantUML diagrams
worksync.desc: Built-in editor for sequence, class, flow, and architecture diagrams with live previews.

worksync.title: AI diagram assistant
worksync.desc: Describe a diagram in natural language and generate PlantUML code with streaming output and one-click apply.

worksync.title: Collaborative whiteboards
worksync.desc: Excalidraw-style whiteboards for brainstorming, reviews, and visual discussion.

worksync.title: Data security
worksync.desc: RBAC, audit logs, online backups, and one-click restore.

chess.title: Top AI engine
chess.desc: Pikafish brings Stockfish-level architecture optimized for Chinese chess.

chess.title: Live streaming analysis
chess.desc: SSE delivers search depth, evaluation, and candidate moves in real time.

chess.title: Online play
chess.desc: Create rooms, invite friends, control time, and reconnect after interruptions.

chess.title: Mobile first
chess.desc: Compact mobile layouts and richer desktop views make analysis smooth anywhere.

sign.title: Scan check-in
sign.desc: Participants scan to check in, big screens show live welcomes, and organizers can collect custom fields.

sign.title: Flexible voting
sign.desc: Simple, image, candidate, and versus voting templates with live results.

sign.title: Animated lottery
sign.desc: Wheel, slot, card flip, and grid modes with custom prizes and probabilities.

sign.title: Smart forms
sign.desc: 10+ field types, preview before submit, CSV export, and phone-friendly scanning.

shopping.title: Products and cart
shopping.desc: Clear product displays, categories, cart operations, and inventory checks.

shopping.title: Search and filtering
shopping.desc: Keyword search, category filters, and price sorting help shoppers find products quickly.

shopping.title: Users and orders
shopping.desc: NextAuth v5 login, order creation, order status, and purchase history.

shopping.title: H5 mobile first
shopping.desc: Compact responsive layouts designed for phones and easy mobile ordering.

timeslot.title: Course booking
timeslot.desc: Browse available dates and slots, book with one click, and prevent conflicts automatically.

timeslot.title: Rich course catalog
timeslot.desc: Supports AP courses, programming, contest training, teachers, and course metadata.

timeslot.title: Teacher and student management
timeslot.desc: Track teacher schedules and student bookings with cancellation and rescheduling support.

timeslot.title: Mobile scan booking
timeslot.desc: Parents scan on mobile to book courses with minimal friction.

advantages.title: Modern stack
advantages.desc: Next.js 16, React 19, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, and Drizzle ORM for reliable delivery.

advantages.title: Flexible deployment
advantages.desc: Cloud subscription or private deployment with data ownership and containerized scaling.

advantages.title: One suite
advantages.desc: Docs collaboration, events, chess AI, H5 commerce, and course booking under one brand.

hero.lead:
Centralized docs, task boards, PlantUML, AI assistant, and whiteboards
for more efficient teamwork
hero.sublead: One toolset per project, from kickoff to delivery, aligning teams internally and clients externally.
hero.screenDesc: Project collaboration platform - dashboards, docs, tasks, and diagrams in one place

zoom.title: Complete Product Experience
zoom.lead: From requirements to delivery, from technical diagrams to whiteboards, one platform covers the full project lifecycle.
zoom.screenDesc: A complete project collaboration interface with dashboards, docs, tasks, and diagrams

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.lead: Choose the option that fits how your team works. Prices are references; final terms follow the contract.
pricing.note: Prices are for reference. Enterprise purchasing, custom development, and long-term support can be discussed separately.

why.title: Why WorkSync
why.lead: Cloud-native and containerized deployment keeps knowledge centralized, progress transparent, and communication traceable.

cta.title: Ready to improve team collaboration?
cta.lead: Try WorkSync and keep docs, tasks, and diagrams flowing in one workspace.

features.title: Data-driven decisions
features.subtitle: Dashboard overview
features.description: See the whole project at a glance across document categories, task status, and user activity.

features.title: Centralized docs
features.subtitle: Unified knowledge base
features.description: Keep design docs, manuals, standards, and notices in a structured tree with online Markdown editing.
bullets: Online Markdown editor with live preview
Design docs, manuals, and standards in one place

features.title: Agile task management
features.subtitle: Board and list views
features.description: Categorize, assign, and track tasks with clear progress. Drag on boards or manage in lists.
bullets: Switch freely between list and board views

features.title: PlantUML diagrams
features.subtitle: Generate diagrams from code
features.description: Create sequence, class, flow, and architecture diagrams for technical discussions and reviews.
bullets: Support for sequence, class, and flow diagrams
Share and embed diagrams in docs

features.title: AI diagram assistant
features.subtitle: Natural language to PlantUML
features.description: Describe what you need and let AI generate complete diagram code that can be applied to the editor.
bullets: Context-aware edits based on current code
Streaming output, interrupt, regenerate, and clear chat
Supports sequence, class, use case, activity, state, component, and ER diagrams
features.screenDesc: Generate PlantUML in chat and apply with one click

features.title: Collaborative whiteboards
features.subtitle: Realtime shared canvas
features.description: Excalidraw-based whiteboards for sketching, annotation, brainstorming, and solution reviews.

pricingTiers.name: Online membership
pricingTiers.detail: Up to 10 concurrent members on annual subscription

pricingTiers.name: Private intranet deployment
pricingTiers.detail: Deploy in your chosen intranet environment with unlimited users

pricingTiers.name: Source license
pricingTiers.detail: Full source code delivery for secondary development and self-hosted operations

advantages.title: One collaboration hub
advantages.desc: Docs, tasks, diagrams, and whiteboards in one platform to reduce tool switching.

advantages.title: Data security
advantages.desc: Online backup, one-click restore, encrypted transfer, permissions, and audit controls.

advantages.title: Cloud-native deployment
advantages.desc: Containerized architecture for private cloud or specified environments with elastic scaling.

advantages.title: Team collaboration
advantages.desc: Align product and engineering internally and share read-only spaces with clients.

Activity.heroBadge: Check-in · voting · lottery · forms - one event engagement solution
Activity.heroLead: Scan to gather, engage the whole room
Activity.heroDesc: No app download required. Participants scan on mobile, big-screen data syncs in seconds, and organizers can create an event in minutes with one short code.
Activity.videoFallback: Your browser does not support video playback
Activity.homeShowcaseLead: A clean product homepage that presents the core modules at a glance.
Activity.coreLead: A one-stop answer for event engagement needs.
Activity.adminLead: Manage all events, create new ones quickly, and control everything in one place.
Activity.loginCaption: Secure account login with email support.
Activity.dashboardCaption: Manage all events and create new ones quickly.
Activity.mobileCheckinCaption: The check-in screen after users scan the code.
Activity.mobileLotteryCaption: The mobile screen for users joining the lottery.
Activity.ctaLead: Try Sign and start a more engaging event journey.

coreAdvantages.title: One code for all
coreAdvantages.description: Each event gets a unique short code. Scan and join instantly.

coreAdvantages.title: Realtime engagement
coreAdvantages.description: SSE pushes data to big screens within seconds.

coreAdvantages.title: Visual impact
coreAdvantages.description: Welcome walls, animated lottery, and live charts.

coreAdvantages.title: Flexible setup
coreAdvantages.description: Nine-position QR layout and multiple display modes.

coreAdvantages.title: Zero friction
coreAdvantages.description: No app download. Scan on mobile and participate.

coreAdvantages.title: Secure and reliable
coreAdvantages.description: Account protection and verification codes reduce abuse.

checkin.title: 📝 Check-in
checkin.subtitle: Scan to check in with live welcome screens.
highlights: Create an independent check-in event with a unique short code
Big-screen display with configurable QR position
Mobile check-in with custom fields such as name and department
Configurable after-check-in behavior: message, redirect, or no action
Three-digit verification code to prevent abuse

screenshots.title: Create check-in
screenshots.desc: Configure title, collected fields, and post-check-in behavior.

screenshots.title: Check-in details
screenshots.desc: View QR code, link, and statistics.

screenshots.title: Check-in settings
screenshots.desc: Configure background, big-screen layout, and fields.

screenshots.title: Big-screen display
screenshots.desc: Show check-in activity live with a strong visual effect.

vote.title: 📊 Voting
vote.subtitle: Multiple templates, live visualization, and versus mode.
highlights: Multiple visualization styles: pie, bar, progress, and versus
Optional vote modification and anonymous voting rules

lottery.title: 🎁 Lottery
lottery.subtitle: Four animated modes that are exciting and transparent.
highlights: Multiple lottery modes: wheel, slot, card flip, and grid
Live winner push and winner list

modes.name: Wheel lottery
modes.desc: Classic wheel effect for annual meetings.

modes.name: Slot lottery
modes.desc: Three scrolling columns stop in sequence to reveal winners.

form.title: 📋 Forms
form.subtitle: Flexible fields, live stats, and CSV export.
highlights: Custom fields: text, number, phone, email, radio, checkbox, dropdown, date, time, rating, and more
One submission per person and phone-required rules
SSE live push for new submissions

scenarios.title: 📊 Information collection
scenarios.effect: Collect employee information and export Excel

ProductHub.title: Product Overview
ProductHub.lead: Murphy Cloud includes five SaaS products: docs collaboration, Sign event engagement, chess AI, mobile commerce, and course booking. Open each live product from here.

pricing.worksync: Online membership ¥199/year; private intranet install ¥1,999 one-time; source license ¥19,999 one-time

ProductHub.worksyncDescription: Project documentation and collaboration: knowledge base, task boards, PlantUML, whiteboards, AI diagram assistant, and analytics so teams and clients stay aligned in one workspace. Ideal for product, engineering, and delivery teams with cloud or private deployment options.
worksyncCapabilities: Knowledge: tree folders + Markdown, adjustable permissions, traceable changes
Delivery tracking: boards / lists, assignments, statuses, and large-screen metrics
Engineering collaboration: PlantUML, whiteboards, and AI diagrams for faster alignment
ProductHub.signDescription: Check-in, voting, lottery, and forms in one place. Scan to join, sync to big screens in seconds, and create events in minutes.
ProductHub.chessDescription: Powered by Pikafish, with live position analysis, best move suggestions, and online matches so every move gets AI support.
ProductHub.shoppingDescription: A Next.js 16 mobile store with product browsing, search, cart management, and order tracking. Mobile-first and easy to shop anywhere.
ProductHub.timeslotDescription: Online booking for AP courses, programming, contest training, and more. Parents scan on mobile while teachers manage schedules and students.
